sources.name: POE2DB
sources.notes: Use for game data such as gems, items, modifiers, passives, and datamined changes. Respect site terms and cache snapshots with timestamps.

sources.name: Path of Exile 2 Wiki
sources.notes: Use as secondary reference for mechanics, item pages, class pages, and patch context.

sources.name: Path of Exile Developer API
sources.notes: Use for account characters, leagues, and POE2 currency exchange history when OAuth/client scopes are configured.

sources.name: Path of Exile 2 Trade
sources.notes: Use for item price verification and exact affix searches. Cache results and respect rate limits and site policy.

sources.name: poe.ninja POE2 Economy
sources.notes: Use as a price trend and unique-item signal, not as the only source for rare item upgrades.

sources.name: User Test Notes
sources.notes: Personal observations, boss kills, mapping speed, deaths, and budget notes can be added as evidence.
